productName: 0.5g Live Resin Inf. 2 Pack Joints - Dutch Gouda Butter - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Dutch Gouda Berry and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
